title: Grilled Lemon Chicken with Herbed Stir-Fry
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish featuring marinated chicken, a citrusy herb stir-fry, and a crunchy German-inspired slaw.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, parsley, and dill. Add the chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Grill the chicken for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a large skillet, heat a tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the onion and cabbage to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together caraway seeds and a pinch of salt. Sprinkle over the beef and vegetables.
Serve the grilled chicken with the herbed stir-fry and a side of German-style slaw (made with shredded cabbage, grated carrot, and a dollop of sour cream).
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
